text: Sleeping all night but still waking up exhausted.
The problem may not be how many hours you slept.
Have you ever gotten a full seven to eight hours of sleep?
Only to wake up feeling heavy, groggy, tired.
And not ready to start the day?
Do you ever feel like your body was asleep
That could be a sign that your sleep quality isn't deep enough
for your body to fully relax and restore itself.
The right support may help promote deeper sleep,
and help your body recover more effectively while you sleep.
Comment, sleep to get more information.
